title: Authority of municipality or parish to designate department of public works its agent
doc_html:
§85.  Authority of municipality or parish to designate department of public works its agent

The governing authority of any municipality or parish may authorize the department of public works to act as its agent for the purposes set forth in R.S. 2:84.
doc_text:
§85.  Authority of municipality or parish to designate department of public works its agent
The governing authority of any municipality or parish may authorize the department of public works to act as its agent for the purposes set forth in R.S. 2:84.
